channel.title: Major Digest - Reliable and Comprehensive News Sources: sports
channel.description: Get the latest news online at Major Digest, the top online news resource for the most reliable news sources. Stay informed about the world around you!

image.title: Major Digest - Reliable and Comprehensive News Sources: sports

item.title: Lakers, Clippers return to their home courts after days of fire devastation across Los Angeles
item.description: LOS ANGELES (AP) — The Lakers and the Clippers both went back to work Monday night in Los Angeles' first two NBA games since catastrophic wildfires killed at least 24 people and destroyed significant sections of their hometown.
item.dc:creator: GREG BEACHAM, Associated Press, PHL 17

item.title: Mike McCarthy won't return as the Cowboys' coach. Deion Sanders could be a candidate to replace him
item.description: DALLAS (AP) — Mike McCarthy will not return as coach of the Dallas Cowboys, who are going on three decades since their last Super Bowl title, owner Jerry Jones said Monday. Jones said the organization and McCarthy mutually agreed to part ways.
item.dc:creator: ROB MAADDI and SCHUYLER DIXON, Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: Raducanu overcomes a shaky serve to advance at the Australian Open
item.description: Winning in the first round at the Australian Open was always going to be more important for 2021 U.S. Open champion Emma Raducanu than how she achieved the result.
item.dc:creator: Associated Press, KPRC 2

item.title: Saquon Barkley's leadership missed in New York
item.description: NEW YORK (PIX11) -- I think I appreciate Saquon Barkley more now than I ever did as a Giant, and sadly probably the Giants do too. There is no question the Giants miss his leadership in the locker room. They also miss the dynamic playmaker that he is on offense.
item.dc:creator: Marc Malusis, PIX 11

item.title: Cubs sign former Brewers starting pitcher to one-year deal
item.description: The Chicago Cubs have signed former Milwaukee Brewers starting pitcher Colin Rea to a new contract for the 2025 MLB season, while the Cubs have designated RHP Michael Arias for assignment to make room for Rea on the 40-man roster.
item.dc:creator: Eli Ong, WGN 9

item.title: UFC champion booted from Frontier flight after being told he couldn't sit in exit row
item.description: Khabib Nurmagomedov suggested that there may have been “racial” or “national” motivations for booting him from the plane — allegations which Frontier has denied.
item.dc:creator: Michael Bartiromo, NewsNation

item.title: Patrick, Brittany Mahomes announce birth of 3rd child
item.description: Patrick and Brittany Mahomes on Monday announced the birth of their third child. The NFL power couple named their child Golden Raye Mahomes.
item.dc:creator: Fox News

item.title: Lamar Jackson and Josh Allen will face off for a berth in the AFC championship game
item.description: Lamar Jackson vs. Josh Allen won’t decide the NFL MVP next week. The stakes are higher with a spot in the AFC championship game on the line.
item.dc:creator: The Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: Patriots introduce Mike Vrabel as new head coach
item.description: The New England Patriots are set to formally introduce Mike Vrabel as the team's 16th head coach in franchise history.
item.dc:creator: Melanie DaSilva, NewsNation

item.title: Ex-Florida QB Jesse Palmer talks College Football Playoff, French-onion beer, and Shedeur Sanders, Cam Ward
item.description: Jesse Palmer recently sat down with Fox News Digital to discuss the College Football Playoff, a new partnership, and Shedeur Sanders and Cam Ward.
item.dc:creator: Fox News

item.title: Coco Gauff delivers 6-word message for those dealing with LA wildfires after Australian Open win
item.description: American tennis star Coco Gauff had a message for those in Los Angeles dealing with the devastating wildfires as she defeated Sofia Kenin in the Australian Open.
item.dc:creator: Fox News

item.title: Frances Tiafoe picks up a tough victory after throwing up at the Australian Open
item.description: MELBOURNE, Australia (AP) — Frances Tiafoe threw up during his first-round match at the Australian Open on Monday along the way to a five-set victory and said afterward he might have quit if this had been just a run-of-the-mill tournament.
item.dc:creator: Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: Jayden Daniels leads Commanders to first playoff win in nearly 7,000 days, 23-20 over the Buccaneers
item.description: TAMPA, Fla. (AP) — New owners. New general manager. New coach. New franchise quarterback. That’s the formula — with an emphasis on the QB — that Washington rode to playoff success after nearly two decades of futility.
item.dc:creator: ROB MAADDI, Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: Hurts tosses 2 TD passes and Goedert throws 3 stiff-arms to lead Eagles past Packers 22-10
item.description: PHILADELPHIA (AP) — Dallas Goedert fired one stiff arm to a Packers defender, smacked him again and then — in a sports city known for its Broad Street Bullies — dispatched one final shot to the face on his way to end zone.
item.dc:creator: DAN GELSTON, Associated Press, Fox 5

item.title: Report: Bears will interview Ron Rivera for head coaching position; team says it has interviewed Lions coordinators
item.description: LAKE FOREST, Ill. — The Bears will reportedly consider a man tied to both of their Super Bowl appearances to try to lead them back there one day. The Chicago Tribune reports the Bears are expected to interview Ron Rivera on Sunday, according to NFL sources.
item.dc:creator: Michael Johnson, WGN 9

item.title: Utah HC loses on late goal to Islanders, 2-1
item.description: SALT LAKE CITY (AP) - Mathew Barzal scored with 1:25 left in regulation and the New York Islanders defeated the Utah Hockey Club 2-1 at Delta Center on Saturday. The forward found a rebound off a scrum in front of the net and lifted it over a sprawling Connor Ingram from the right circle.
item.dc:creator: Dana Greene, ABC 4

item.title: Utah State beats Boise State on 4-point play, 81-79
item.description: LOGAN, Utah (ABC4 Sports) - The #25 Utah State men’s basketball remained perfect in league play in dramatic fashion, defeating Boise State 81-79 in the Dee Glen Smith Spectrum.
item.dc:creator: Dana Greene, ABC 4

item.title: Single-match tickets for San Diego FC games now available
item.description: The 2025 inaugural season for San Diego FC is just around the corner and fans can now purchase single-match tickets for all 21 home games.
item.dc:creator: Amber Coakley, Fox 5

item.title: Key matchup of Texans-Chargers playoff game: Will Anderson Jr., Danielle Hunter against tackles Rashawn Slater, Joe Alt
item.description: Texans defense against Chargers offense is the key matchup for Saturday's AFC wild-card round playoff game
item.dc:creator: Aaron Wilson, KPRC 2

item.title: Chicago faces Sacramento, aims for 5th straight home win
item.description: Sacramento Kings (19-19, ninth in the Western Conference) vs. Chicago Bulls (18-20, 10th in the Eastern Conference) Chicago; Sunday, 3:30 p.m. EST BOTTOM LINE: Chicago hosts Sacramento aiming to extend its four-game home winning streak. The Bulls have gone 8-11 at home.
item.dc:creator: Associated Press, WGN 9

item.title: Lindsey Vonn impresses skiing into 6th place in her first World Cup downhill race since 2019
item.description: The racecourse commentator broadcasting Lindsey Vonn's first World Cup downhill race since 2019 — the American is age 40 and has a titanium knee — summed up how impressive the ski great's performance was.
item.dc:creator: Associated Press, Fox 5

item.title: LA Rams head for Arizona and a crucial playoff game with their minds on their fire-ravaged hometown
item.description: The Los Angeles Rams wrapped up practice at their training complex Friday under blue skies with bruise-colored clouds of wildfire smoke lurking on the horizon.
item.dc:creator: GREG BEACHAM, Associated Press, Fox 5

item.title: Real Salt Lake trades leading scorer Chicho Arango
item.description: In the span of one year, Real Salt Lake's high-powered offense has been dismantled, leaving some fans questioning the team's direction and competitive outlook.
item.dc:creator: Mattey Casey, ABC 4

item.title: Jazz go cold in 97-92 loss to the Heat
item.description: SALT LAKE CITY (AP) - The Utah Jazz just can't seem to find a way to be able to close out games at home this season. Tyler Herro scored 23 points and Jaime Jaquez had 20, including five in the final 1:03, to lead the Miami Heat to a 97-92 victory over the Utah Jazz on Thursday night.
item.dc:creator: Dana Greene, ABC 4

item.title: CMU Basketball: Men get first RMAC win under Dunlap as Women cruise past NMHU
item.description: After a three-week break, Colorado Mesa Basketball is back. And they're off to a great start in 2025.
item.dc:creator: Big Will Levenson, KREX 5

item.title: Here's how much it will cost to (possibly) see Messi play in San Jose
item.description: (KRON) -- Tickets for the San Jose Earthquakes' home match against Inter Miami went on sale Thursday. The match offers a potential chance for Bay Area soccer fans to see Miami and Argentina star Lionel Messi in action.
item.dc:creator: Alex Baker, KRON4

item.title: How you can snag $10 tickets to a Utah Hockey Club game
item.description: If you've been eager to be a part of Utah Hockey Club's inaugural season but felt a little overwhelmed by the price of tickets, you may have a chance to snag tickets for just $10 apiece.
item.dc:creator: Derick Fox, ABC 4

item.title: 6 Bulls earn CSC Academic All-District honors
item.description: The University of South Florida football program had six student-athletes earn recognition on the 2024 Academic All-District Football Team.
item.dc:creator: Brian Siegrist, USF Associate AD, WFLA, NBC

item.title: Rams could be calling Arizona home for Monday's playoff game
item.description: The National Football League announced a potential change to the Vikings-Rams playoff game scheduled for Monday night at SoFi Stadium in Los Angeles.
item.dc:creator: Tony Kurzweil, KTLA 5

item.title: NHL postpones LA Kings' home game against Calgary due to wildfires while NFL, NBA monitor situation
item.description: LOS ANGELES (AP) — The NHL postponed the Los Angeles Kings' home game against the Calgary Flames on Wednesday with several massive wildfires burning across the greater Los Angeles area. The Kings and Flames were scheduled to play Wednesday night at the Kings' downtown arena.
item.dc:creator: GREG BEACHAM, Associated Press, NewsNation

item.title: White Sox sign former Seattle Mariners infielder
item.description: CHICAGO (WGN) — The Chicago White Sox signed free agent infielder Josh Rojas Wednesday, according to a press release from the team. The White Sox agreed to terms on a one-year, $3.5-million contract with Rojas. Rojas spent the 2024 season with the Seattle Mariners, hitting .225/.304/.
item.dc:creator: Eli Ong, WGN 9

item.title: Boys Basketball: Canyon Hills 47, Crawford 39
item.description: SAN DIEGO (KUSI)- Boys basketball on Tuesday night at Crawford with the Colts hosting Canyon Hills. Rattlers win a very competitive defensive battle 47-39.
item.dc:creator: Fox 5

item.title: Thune tees up Tuberville's bill to block transgender athletes from women’s sports
item.description: Senate Majority Leader John Thune (R-S.D.) on Tuesday took the necessary procedural steps to place Sen. Tommy Tuberville’s (R-Ala.) bill blocking transgender athletes from women’s sports on the Senate calendar. The step sets up a vote on Tuberville’s bill in the weeks ahead.
item.dc:creator: Alexander Bolton, NewsNation

item.title: Former Baltimore Orioles left-hander Brian Matusz, who made final MLB appearance with Cubs in 2016, dies at 37
item.description: BALTIMORE (AP) — Brian Matusz, the left-handed pitcher who spent eight seasons in the major leagues and made his final big-league appearance with the Cubs during their 2016 World Series championship season, has died. He was 37. Matusz, a former No.
item.dc:creator: Associated Press, WGN 9

item.title: Jazz lose on half-court shot at the buzzer
item.description: SALT LAKE CITY (ABC4 Sports) - The Utah Jazz' attempt at its first three-game winning streak of the season ended in heartbreaking fashion. Trae Young hit a buzzer-beating 3-pointer from beyond the halfcourt line to give the Atlanta Hawks a 124-121 victory over the Jazz on Tuesday night.
item.dc:creator: Dana Greene, ABC 4

item.title: Brayden Point scores with 52 seconds to play to lift Lightning to 3-2 win over Hurricanes
item.description: Brayden Point scored with 52 seconds to play and the Tampa Bay Lightning snapped a four-game skid with a 3-2 victory over the Carolina Hurricanes on Tuesday night.
item.dc:creator: ERIK ERLENDSSON Associated Press, WFLA, NBC

item.title: CMU Women's wrestler Marissa Gallegos reflects on wrestling journey
item.description: GRAND JUNCTION, Colo. (KREX)—Marissa Gallegos is no stranger to the spotlight. The Colorado Mesa University star has cemented her legacy as the winningest women’s wrestler in program history. Her career, defined by grit, dominance, and determination, has inspired athletes across the sport.
item.dc:creator: Titus Cleveland, KREX 5
